heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 20211 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2021136 App.:5809., , .Nov. 18, 1997Pub. L. 105–85, title XV, § 1509111 Stat. 1965The words “officers and agents” are substituted for “officers, directors, employees, and agents” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.
